# polaris_sso_group (List Resource)

The `polaris_sso_group` resource is used to create and manage SSO groups in RSC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "polaris_sso_group" "all" {
  provider = polaris
}

list "polaris_sso_group" "by_name" {
  provider = polaris

  config {
    name = "Engineering"
  }
}

list "polaris_sso_group" "by_name_and_domain" {
  provider = polaris

  config {
    name            = "Engineering"
    auth_domain_id  = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth_domain_id` (String) Filter SSO groups by auth domain ID (identity provider ID).
- `name` (String) Filter SSO groups by name.
